name: Ring of Necrotic Resistance
effect: Resistance to necrotic damage while attuned.

name: Hendvar's Enchanting Tools
description: Portable enchanting station — a toolkit rather than a fixed station.

name: Whetstone of Keen Edge
effect: 1/rest.

name: Everlasting Blue Candles
description: Candles that do not burn down.

name: Boots of the Tireless North
description: Soft leather, northern make, clan stitching along the ankle. Worn looking but perfectly preserved. Sized for small feet.
effect: No movement penalties in difficult terrain (snow, ice, mud, rubble). Travel pace never causes exhaustion regardless of distance covered in a day.

name: Northern Recurve Bow
description: Short recurve hunting bow, northern construction. Viable from horseback or tight terrain. Luminescent bowstring, pulls smooth and silent.

name: True Journal
description: Blank pages — cannot be written in deliberately. Cover worked with a pattern Kerra read immediately without being asked.
effect: Records automatically whatever the bearer witnesses that is genuinely true — not believed to be true, actually true. Only truth gets in.
notes: No one else in the party has processed what this means for someone with Kerra's history, her patron, and her years of reading things she shouldn't.

name: Blackwood Wand Focus
description: Blackwood wand usable as a spellcasting focus.
effect: +1 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC.

name: Sending Stones — Vaz / Tielle
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Vaz / Vrethka
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Vaz / Kern
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Tielle / Marcus
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Tielle / Ledwent
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Tielle / Gaelestrasz
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Tielle / Casvath
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Tielle / Coalbeard
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Tielle / Harwick
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Unpaired (x2)
effect: Short distance only. No paired counterpart yet.

name: Veilstrike Rapier +2
notes: Main hand. +9 to hit, 1d8+7 damage.

name: Echo Dagger +2
notes: Off-hand. +9 to hit, 1d4+7 damage.

name: Warden Dagger
notes: Boot dagger. +1 to attack and damage vs fiends and aberrations.

name: Hand Crossbow +2
notes: Primary ranged option.

name: Wyvern Scale Coat +2
notes: Vaz' signature look.

name: Bracer of Swift Strikes
notes: Reaction: off-hand attack on main hand hit. Frees bonus action.

name: Stone Disc
notes: Witness item. Perceives concealment — sees what is hidden.

name: The Book
notes: Witness texts. Still being read.

name: Berserker's Fang +1
notes: Greataxe. 1d12+7 while raging (STR mod + rage bonus + magic).

name: Bracers of Defense
notes: +2 AC when not wearing armor or using a shield.

name: Bracers of Defense
notes: +2 AC when not wearing armor or using a shield.

name: Ring of Protection +1
notes: +1 AC and saving throws.

name: Cloak of Displacement
notes: Attackers have disadvantage until she takes damage each round.

name: Paired Shortsword
notes: Main hand. Resonance with Pirra's paired shortsword — both gain advantage on first attack each round when within 30ft of each other.

name: Paired Shortsword
notes: Main hand. Resonance with Pirra's paired shortsword — both gain advantage on first attack each round when within 30ft of each other.

name: The Farreach (A)
effect: Advantage on first attack each round when within 30ft of paired ring. +1d6 force damage. Once per day: responsive bonus to an ability or skill check. Always warm.

name: The Farreach (B)
effect: Advantage on first attack each round when within 30ft of paired ring. +1d6 force damage. Once per day: responsive bonus to an ability or skill check. Always warm.

name: Dagger of Swift Strike +1
effect: Once per turn on a hit: immediately make a second strike with this dagger as part of the same attack, without using a bonus action.
flavor: The iridescence pulses faintly when it connects — like something eager being satisfied.
notes: Named privately. Hasn't told anyone.

name: Ring of Watchful Eye
notes: +1 Perception, Darkvision, Detect Magic 1/day.

name: Boots of Elvenkind
notes: Advantage on Stealth checks to move silently.

name: Boots of Elvenkind
notes: Advantage on Stealth checks to move silently.

name: Gloves of Thievery
notes: +5 to Sleight of Hand and to pick locks.

name: Obsidian Stone
notes: Witness item. Shows all exits and entrances simultaneously.

name: Alchemical Dagger
notes: Passive: proficiency extension on alchemical checks, substance detection on touch.

name: Magical Aura Detector
notes: 30ft range.

name: Amulet of Health
notes: Sets CON to 19.

name: Dark Lens
notes: Witness item. Sees through fabrication — constructed falsehoods show their true structure.

name: Warding Vambrace
notes: Reaction 1/day: reduce incoming damage by 1d10+3.

name: Pearl of Power
notes: Recover one expended spell slot up to 3rd level. 1/day.

name: Silvered Shortsword
notes: Backup. +1 to attack and damage vs fiends and lycanthropes (silvered).

name: Silvered Shortsword
notes: Backup. +1 to attack and damage vs fiends and lycanthropes (silvered).

name: Hourglass
notes: Witness item. Affects time perception or probability — still being processed.

name: Frost Shortsword +1
notes: Frost-touched damage.

name: Mithral Chain Shirt
notes: Backup. No stealth disadvantage.

name: Enchanted Mace
notes: Command word: Calm Light — penetrates magical darkness. Sanctuary Trigger 1/day as bonus action without expending a spell slot. Named by Petra.

name: Bracers +1 AC
notes: +1 to AC.

name: Longsword +2
notes: Pact weapon.

name: Gauntlet
notes: Witness item. Completes the pact begun three years ago in the Millhaven mines. Different in nature from all other Witness items.

name: Whisper Longbow +2
notes: +10 to hit, 1d8+6 damage. Two attacks.

name: Short Sword
notes: Backup melee.

name: Bracers of Archery
notes: +2 damage on ranged attacks with longbows and shortbows.

name: Gloves of Dueling
notes: Applies when using a single one-handed weapon.

name: Bracers of Archery
notes: +2 damage on ranged attacks with longbows and shortbows.

name: Rapier
notes: Backup.

name: Headband of Intellect
notes: Sets INT to 19.

name: Plain Band Ring
notes: Witness item. Remembers every voice ever heard.

name: Cloak of Protection
notes: +1 to AC and saving throws.

name: Carved Bone Totem
notes: Spellcasting focus. Thirty years old.

name: Hide Armor
notes: Worn and repaired many times.

name: Simple Spear
notes: Hasn't used offensively in fifteen years. Carries from habit.

name: Longbow +2 (Force)
effect: Deals force damage instead of piercing.
notes: 800g minus material trade discount.

name: Bracer of Steady Aim
effect: Advantage on concentration saving throws after taking damage.
notes: Both concentration and +1 hit bonus

name: Ring of Spell Storing (5 levels)
effect: Holds up to 5 levels worth of spells. Any creature can cast a stored spell using the ring.

name: Ring of Spell Storing (3rd level)
effect: Holds one spell up to 3rd level. Releases on wearer's command.

name: Ring of Impact
effect: Stops a harsh impact once per day.

name: Leather Armor +2 (Southern)
effect: Light as cloth, southern make.
notes: AC 14 + DEX mod + 2.

name: Staff of Evocation
effect: Adds bonus damage to evocation spells.

name: Two Rubies
effect: For Helm of Brilliance reconstruction.

name: Concentration Robes
effect: Easier concentration checks — something in the weave.

name: Elemental Resistance Robes
effect: Resistance to one element, chosen on attunement.

name: Green Cloak of Presence
effect: Advantage on Persuasion and Performance checks. Once per day: hold a room.
notes: stat_bonuses are advantage not flat — handle in dnd_utils separately.

name: Grip Wrap +1
effect: +1 to hit with the wrapped weapon.
notes: In stock.

name: Bow Grip
effect: Reduces moving shot penalty. Fits longbow or recurve.

name: Bone Ring of Weapon Retention
effect: Cannot be disarmed.

name: Grip Wraps +1 (commissioned)
effect: +1 to hit with the wrapped weapon.
notes: Commissioned from Greyback claw materials. Ready in 4 days.

name: Ravine Stalker Crossbow (commissioned, at least 2-4 items)
effect: Exceptional force, quieter release than standard hand crossbow.
notes: Hand crossbow size. Built from Ravine Stalker jaw construction. Ready in 3 weeks.

name: Cloak Pin of Waterproofing
effect: Rain moves around the wearer.

name: Battle Spellbook
effect: Contains: Blight, Fire Shield, Ice Storm, Otiluke's Resilient Sphere, Cone of Cold, Destructive Wave, Immolation, Cloudkill.

name: Wand of Magic Missiles
effect: Cast Magic Missile using charges.

name: Belt of Constitution
effect: CON enhancement. Harder to kill.
notes: Abjuration. 400g. CON bonus amount not specified — update stat_bonuses or stat_overrides when known.

name: Cloak of the Manta Ray
effect: Breathe underwater. Swim speed 60.

name: Cloak of Elvenkind
effect: Advantage on Stealth checks outdoors. Color shifting.

name: Circlet of Blasting
effect: Cast Scorching Ray once per day.

name: Helmet of Proof
effect: Immunity to charm and fear.

name: Bracers of Spell Storing
effect: Holds spells up to 5th level.

name: Ring of Flexible Action
effect: Once per day: one action becomes a bonus action.

name: Amulet of Poison Immunity
effect: Complete immunity to poison while worn.

name: Cloak of Displacement
effect: Attackers have disadvantage on attack rolls until she takes damage each round.
notes: Rhuna already has one — confirm this is a second copy or update her entry.

name: Potion of Greater Healing
effect: Restores 4d4+4 HP.
notes: Well made, reliable.

name: Medallion of Concentration
effect: Advantage on all concentration checks.

name: Leather Armor of the Covenant
effect: Three properties: (1) Hit point maximum increased by 10 — permanent, not temporary. (2) Once per long rest: when the wearer drops to 0 HP, drop to 1 instead. (3) Advantage on saving throws against being charmed, frightened, or possessed.
flavor: As she puts it on, the vest-shape forms to fit her exactly and a shimmering dark blue set of sleeves and a sort of skirt-with-4-slits extends downward.
notes: hp_max bonus requires dnd_utils to add stat_bonuses.hp_max to character hp.max in resolution. Advantage on charm/fear/possession saves needs active_effects or separate handling — cannot be expressed as a flat stat_bonus.

name: The Weaver's Master-Awl
description: A simple ancient bone-handled leatherworking awl. The needle-point glows with a faint psionic violet hue. Hums with the collective tactical memories of 156 years when held.
effect: Four properties: (1) Psionic Reinforcement — Psychic Blades gain +2 to attack and damage rolls; Psi-Bolstered Knack successes do not expend the Psionic Energy die. (2) Tactical Foresight — Master of Tactics Help action targets two allies instead of one; each gains a bonus to their next saving throw equal to INT modifier. (3) Grandmaster's Stitch — during a long rest, touch leather armor or a leather item to infuse it for 24 hours: wearer gains resistance to Psychic damage and advantage on saves against Charmed and Frightened. (4) The Retired Special — once per day reaction when an ally is hit: pull them up to 15ft to an unoccupied space, potentially causing the attack to miss.
notes: Requires attunement by a Rogue.

name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
effect: Sets STR to 19.

name: Belt of Constitution (Corwin)
effect: Sets CON to 18.
notes: Named to distinguish from any other Belt of Constitution in party_items.

name: Cloak of Protection +1 (Corwin)
effect: +1 AC and saving throws.

name: Collapsible Shield +2
effect: Caster friendly, lightweight. Collapsible.

name: Scroll of Thunderstorm
effect: Single use. Large area lightning damage.

name: Wand of Web
effect: Cast Web using charges.

name: Wand of Wonder
effect: Cast random magical effect using charges.

name: Wand of Secrets
effect: Detects secret doors and traps within 30ft.

name: Cloak of Invisibility
effect: Become invisible for up to 1 hour per day. Concentration.
notes: Unassigned.

name: Cloak of Arachnida
effect: Spider climb. Immunity to web. Cast Web 1/day.

name: Rope of Climbing and Entanglement
effect: 60ft rope, animates on command. Restrain target 1/day.

name: Circlet of Scorching Ray 3
effect: Cast Scorching Ray 3 times per day.

name: Circlet of Mental Fortress
effect: Advantage on INT, WIS, and CHA saving throws. Resistance to psychic damage.

name: Belt of Giant Strength
effect: Sets STR to 27.

name: Telescope
effect: Shows locations as they were in the past.

name: Coin of Truth
effect: Ask yes/no questions. Always truthful.

name: Gemstones
notes: 7 rubies, 6 opals, 4 spinel, 2 sapphire, 5 diamonds.

name: Unmarked Ring
effect: Detects scrying attempts.
notes: Vaz wearing.

name: Sword of Sharpness
effect: On a roll of 20: severs a limb and deals an extra 14 damage on that hit.
notes: Northern metal. Whoever made this knew what they were doing.

name: Halberd of Warning
effect: While carrying — even collapsed — wielder cannot be surprised and has advantage on initiative rolls. Wakes wielder if danger approaches during sleep. Warning properties require no attunement. Attunement required for +2 attack and damage bonus.

name: Eight Unknown Coins
notes: Large gold coins, unfamiliar crest. Not Western Reach minting. Not any region Vaz immediately recognizes. Found with Ring of Mind Shielding.

name: Gloves of Spellcasting
effect: Every spell cast is treated as one level higher automatically. Cantrips become 1st level, 1st level becomes 2nd, and so on. No limit on uses.

name: Staff of Power
effect: Cast from charges: Magic Missile, Ray of Enfeeblement, Fireball, Lightning Bolt, Cone of Cold, Hold Monster, Wall of Force, Globe of Invulnerability. Functions as +2 quarterstaff. If wielder drops to 0hp: may choose to retributively break it, releasing all remaining charges in a catastrophic explosion.
notes: Do not break it.

name: Returning Spear +2
effect: Returns to hand immediately after being thrown. On a critical hit: target is knocked prone regardless of size.

name: Cloak of the Deep
effect: Resistance to cold damage. Breathe water permanently, no spell required. Move through water at full speed without penalty. Advantage on Stealth checks underwater.

name: Ceremonial Horn
effect: Functions as both drinking vessel and musical instrument. Tip opens via hidden clasp concealed within scrollwork — appears purely decorative. Seal is watertight and airtight, preserves both liquid and tone.
notes: Pre-clan-separation northern craftsmanship, believed lost. Metalwork band contains pre-separation clan markings.

name: Sending Stones — Vaz / Relk
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.
notes: Vaz's half transfers to Tielle when ready.

name: Sending Stones — Unpaired (x3)
effect: Short distance only. No paired counterpart yet.

name: Sending Stone — Relk (goodwill)
description: Single sending stone left with Relk as goodwill gesture.
effect: Unpaired.
notes: Left as contact gesture, not part of the network.

name: Cloak of Protection +2
effect: +2 to AC and saving throws.

name: Bracers of Defense +2
effect: +2 AC when not wearing armor or shield.

name: Tome of Clear Thought
effect: Reading takes 48 hours over 6 days. INT score and maximum increase by 2. Becomes mundane afterward for 100 years before recharged.
notes: Read on day 121.

name: Bottled Daylight
effect: Releases daylight equivalent illumination when opened.

name: Greatsword +3
effect: On a critical hit: target makes a STR saving throw or is knocked prone.

name: Belt of Giant Strength
effect: Sets STR to 21.

name: Bracers of Swiftness
effect: +10ft movement speed. Dash as bonus action once per short rest.

name: Hand Crossbow +2 (Rooting)
effect: Once per turn on a hit: choose to deal damage as normal OR root target in place until end of their next turn.

name: Rapier +2 (Psychic)
effect: On a hit: choose to deal psychic damage instead of piercing.

name: Wellspring
effect: When bearer casts a healing spell, all creatures within 5ft automatically regain 2hp. No action required.

name: Shield of Expression
effect: Bearer concentrates to display any image or symbol on the shield face. Utility and signaling.

name: Shield of Retribution
effect: When bearer is hit by a melee attack, attacker automatically takes 1d6 force damage.

name: Robe of Stars
effect: Cast Magic Missile at 5th level using charges. +1 to all saving throws. Can planewalk to the Astral Plane and back as an action.
notes: Is actually a cloak

name: Ioun Stone of Mastery
effect: Proficiency bonus increases by 1 while attuned.
notes: Orbits the attuned creature's head.

name: Amulet of the Devout +2
effect: +2 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC. Must be a cleric or paladin to attune.

name: Necklace of Prayer Beads
effect: Each bead cast once per day. Rolled spells: Bless, Greater Restoration, Cure Wounds, Wind Walk.
notes: Must be a cleric, druid, or paladin to attune.

name: Waive
effect: Whenever bearer casts a healing spell, all other creatures within 15ft are healed for 2hp.

name: Hat of Perception
effect: +1 passive perception. Advantage on Perception checks in dim light or darkness.

name: Cloak of Unremarkability
effect: Wearer becomes visually uncompelling — the eye slides past without focusing.

name: Gloves of Thievery
effect: Invisible while worn. +5 to Sleight of Hand and lockpicking checks.
notes: Denna already has a pair — confirm if this is a second copy or a replacement entry.

name: Ring of Free Action
effect: Unaffected by difficult terrain, movement speed reduction, and paralysis.

name: Ring of Jumping
effect: Jump distance tripled.

name: Amulet of Health
effect: Sets CON to 19.
notes: Jaygar already has one equipped. Confirm if this is a second copy.

name: Longsword +2 (Bronze Flame)
effect: Command word ignites bronze edges — adds 2d6 fire damage to each hit while active. Flame is controlled and precise, burns only what it's told to burn.

name: The Lexicon
effect: When held as spellcasting focus: spell save DC +2. Once per long rest when casting a spell of 3rd level or higher: cast it as if using a slot one level higher without expending the higher slot.
notes: Runes translate loosely as 'the word made sharp'. Old name for an old concept.

name: The Steadfast
effect: Reaction when any ally within 30ft drops to 0hp: grant that ally 1d8 + proficiency bonus temporary hit points, potentially keeping them conscious. Once per short rest. Additionally: advantage on death saving throws.
notes: No maker's name, no origin runes. Just the inscription.

name: Ring of Transmutation
effect: 1 charge: cast Alter Self without concentration — change appearance, gain natural weapons, or adapt to aquatic environments including water breathing and swim speed, lasts 1 hour. 2 charges: cast Polymorph on yourself only. 3 charges: cast Gaseous Form.

name: Hand Crossbow +2
notes: Primary ranged weapon. The one from Torvaine's shop — can root target on hit once per turn instead of dealing damage.

name: Trident
notes: Preferred melee weapon. Can be thrown. Suits her performance background — dramatic without being impractical.

name: Ring of Lightning Resistance
notes: Recovered from Darrock Wilnkarn's lockbox. Hers originally, taken when she was first approached two years ago.

name: Leather Armor +1
notes: Good quality, worn in.

name: Stormsplit
notes: Appears as a +2 flail dealing radiant damage. When the handle is rubbed the chain straightens into a +2 morningstar dealing lightning damage instead. Switching between forms takes a bonus action. Named Stormsplit by Revven himself the day he received it.

name: Medium Armor
notes: Chain shirt currently. Practical, unglamorous, has a dent he keeps meaning to have fixed.

name: Warhammer
notes: Primary weapon. Well used, well maintained.

name: Shield
notes: Standard issue. Has a dent he hasn't mentioned to anyone.

name: Half Plate
notes: Practical. Nothing decorative about it.
